data.body:
[verification evidence — AC: live pypi environment configured to codified policy] Configured autonomously via the admin GitHub API (gh as JoeOakhartNava):

BEFORE (drifted — would FAIL the release-time preflight):
- protection_rules: ['branch_policy'] only — required_reviewers ABSENT.
- deployment-branch-policies: [('v*','tag')] — the OLD tag policy, NOT main-only.

ACTION: PUT /repos/navapbc/rebar/environments/pypi with reviewers=[{type:User,id:207596960 (JoeOakhartNava)}], prevent_self_review=false, deployment_branch_policy={protected_branches:false, custom_branch_policies:true}; DELETE the v* tag policy (id 51491778); POST a 'main' branch policy (id 54767221).

AFTER (compliant):
- protection_rules: ['branch_policy','required_reviewers']; required_reviewers=[JoeOakhartNava].
- deployment-branch-policies: [('main','branch')].
- Live env re-read piped through scripts/release_guards.py env-preflight -> EXIT 0 (compliant), so the release-time preflight now passes against the real environment.
